migrationPlan.deferralReason: Schema migration + backfill + ChipLagEvidenceAudit update is well-bounded but exceeds P29K primary goal. Deferred to P29L.

steps.action: Add availableAt DateTime? to InstitutionalChip in prisma/schema.prisma
Run npx prisma migrate dev --name add_chip_available_at
Update syncInstitutionalChip() to set availableAt = chip date + 17:30 TWN (= 09:30 UTC)
Backfill existing rows: availableAt = date + 1 day 09:30 UTC (T-1 conservative)
Update ChipLagEvidenceAudit to reclassify using availableAt evidence
